acquisition method: MS data was acquired using a data-dependent top20 method dynamically choosing the most abundant precursor ions from the survey scan
alkylation reagent: alkylated with iodoacetamide (200 mM IAA/100 mM NH4HCO3)
alkylation concentration: alkylated with iodoacetamide (200 mM IAA/100 mM NH4HCO3)
cleavage agent: The trypsin was selected as digestion enzyme.
collision energy: Normalized collision energy was 27 and the isolation window was set to 1.5 Th.
instrument: MS experiments were performed on a Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: reduced with dithiothreitol (10 mM DTT/ 100 mM NH4HCO3)
reduction concentration: reduced with dithiothreitol (10 mM DTT/ 100 mM NH4HCO3)
